title: albizia polyantha
intro: Albizia polyantha, also known as the siris or pithraj, is a small to medium-sized deciduous tree native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Albizia polyantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Albizia polyantha include the use of its leaves, bark, and roots in traditional medicine, which can be brewed into teas, made into infusions, or used as extracts to harness its therapeutic properties.
